description: Composition Maroon kurti, made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck, three quarter length sleeves, side bust darts, alternate print panel and stitch detail around the neck and edges of the sleeves, and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This is a lovely warm-coloured kurti from aurelia with an Indian style fabric highlighting the front and cuffs. Three quarter length sleeves make this perfect for a cooler day so just pop it on over jeans for an easy, comfortable look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
